name: keka
description: Reads and writes the documented Keka HRMS REST API surface for Core HR, documents, leave, attendance, payroll, PSA, PMS, hire, expense, assets, requisitions, skills, and BGV resources.

risk.read: external Keka HRMS API read of employee, attendance, leave, payroll, PSA, hiring, expense, asset, requisition, skill, and BGV data
risk.write: live Keka API mutations can create or update employee, leave, payroll payment, client, project, performance, hiring, asset, skill, and BGV records
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan, preview, and approval token before live Keka mutations execute

conformance.reason: custom-auth-only (mode:custom AuthHook, no when-gated non-custom fallback); conformance synthetic config cannot route config.token_url to the replay server, so auth-resolving dynamic checks would fail before reaching streams. The Keka AuthHook token exchange is covered by internal/connectors/paritytest/keka for legacy paths; Pass B stream and write definitions are declarative and statically validated against the official Keka Postman documentation.
